name: McHale, John
resolved_employer: Genesis Inventions, L.P. (Partner) - Austin serial-entrepreneur/investment partnership; founder of multiple tech companies (IntelliQuest, TippingPoint, BreakingPoint) and of TrackingPoint (precision-guided firearms)
evidence: John McHale is a well-known Austin serial tech entrepreneur/investor and Partner at Genesis Inventions; founded IntelliQuest (NASDAQ 1996), NetSpeed, TippingPoint, BreakingPoint. He also founded TrackingPoint, Inc. (2011), maker of Precision Guided Firearm systems, and Genesis Inventions/McHale Labs led its $29M Series D in 2014. Employer 'Genesis Inventions' + occupation 'Partner' match; Austin 78703.
